nasb.text: When he had gone through those districts and had given them much exhortation, he came to Greece.

esv.text: When he had gone through those regions and had given them much encouragement, he came to Greece.

cnv.text: 他走遍那一帶地方，用許多話勸勉眾人，然後來到希臘。

ccb.text: 他走遍那一带，用许多劝勉的话鼓励当地的门徒。之后，他又去希腊，

csbs.text: 他走遍了那些地区，用很多的话鼓励门徒们，就来到希腊，
